05 — Misc / Privacy

Privacy — Todd Libby

5

Privacy policy

This site does not track you. No analytics, no advertising, no third-party scripts that follow you around the web.

What is stored

Theme preference
Stored in localStorage on your device. Never sent to a server. Clear it any time by clearing your browser storage.

What is not stored

  • No cookies
  • No analytics
  • No advertising trackers
  • No fingerprinting
  • No personal data collected
  • No data sold or shared with third parties

Third parties

Google Fonts
Fonts are loaded from Google Fonts. Google may log the request. Use a browser extension that blocks Google Fonts requests to avoid this.
GitHub API
The GitHub panel fetches public data from the GitHub API. No credentials or personal data are sent.
YouTube
The speaking page links to YouTube videos. YouTube may set cookies if you interact with them. Videos use youtube-nocookie.com where possible.
Netlify
This site is hosted on Netlify, who may collect standard server logs (IP address, request time, user agent). See Netlify's privacy policy .

Questions

Questions about privacy? Contact me.

Short version

No tracking. No ads. No funny business.

Cookies

None

Analytics

None

Last updated

April 2026

Questions

Contact me
